title: Surgeon Vacancy at Drishti Eye Care - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Surgeon Vacancy at Drishti Eye Care - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Drishti Eye Care, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Surgeon for our Ranchi operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Drishti Eye Care:
Drishti Eye Care is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in NABH Standards
• Proficiency in Pharmacovigilance
• Proficiency in HIPAA Compliance
• Proficiency in Infection Control
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in ICU Management
• Proficiency in Medical Terminology

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Annual performance appraisal
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Ranchi, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Drishti Eye Care!
